RESEARCH GRANTS
Our Centre for Research and Development provides guidance to faculty for Funding Opportunity Identification, Grant Proposal Preparation, Securing Grants, Strategic Planning of Research Funding, Completion and Reporting. Through collaboration with various funding agencies, we have successfully completed numerous projects, demonstrating our commitment to fostering research excellence.
